idea-plugin.name: Beautiful Code Screenshot
idea-plugin.description:
Turn your selected code into a stunning, shareable image — right inside your IDE.

Select any code, right-click, and choose Make a Screenshot. The plugin renders your code with full syntax highlighting from your current color scheme, wrapped in a macOS-style window with rounded corners, a drop shadow, and traffic light buttons.

Features

  • Syntax-accurate rendering — uses your IDE's own highlighter, output matches what you see
  • Background presets — transparent, 8 solid colors, or 8 beautiful gradients
  • Remembers your last choice — background selection persists across sessions
  • Copy to clipboard — paste directly into Slack, Twitter, Notion, or any tool
  • Save as PNG — export to a file with a native save dialog
  • No external dependencies — runs locally, no cloud, no accounts required

Perfect for

  • Sharing code snippets on social media
  • Writing blog posts or documentation
  • Code reviews and presentations

action.description: Creates a beautiful image from selected code
